headline: DIA Skips the S&P 500 Noise and Delivers Monthly Checks to Retirees Instead
summary: Monthly dividend checks. A portfolio anchored in Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar, and Microsoft. An expense ratio so low it barely registers. For retirees navigating a market where the VIX has climbed nearly 30% in a single month and consumer sentiment sits at a recessionary 56.4, the case for owning the Dow Jones Industrial Average through SPDR ... DIA Skips the S&P 500 Noise and Delivers Monthly Checks to Retirees Instead

headline: Caterpillar Showcases AI Jobsite Tech As Valuation Tracks Autonomous Future
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) is set to use CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 as a major showcase for AI-driven jobsite technology and concept vehicles. The company plans to highlight autonomous equipment, integrated fleet management tools, and AI-powered command centers at the event. Caterpillar will also present advanced safety features and upgraded digital rental and service platforms for customers. Caterpillar, a heavyweight in construction and mining equipment, is using CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026 to spotlight...
